app.name: Sottobicchiere
app.tagline: Games and socialising at your table
app.description: Gaming PWA for bars and venues: multiplayer games with your table's QR code

welcome.scan_title: Scan the QR code at your table
welcome.scan_description: Scan the QR code on the table to join or create a game session.
welcome.privacy_note: No account needed. Your data is not saved.
welcome.mobile_qr_hint: If you are already on your phone, use the button above.
welcome.create_room_description: At home, in the park or at the club: create your own game table and let others join.

room.new_description: Spin up a space on the fly and let others join via QR, link or code. No account, fully temporary.
room.create_error: Could not create the table. Please try again.
room.create_success_toast: Table created! Share it with others.
room.share_description: Share one of these so others can join.
room.privacy_note: The table is anonymous and temporary: it deletes itself after a few hours.
room.join_description: Enter the 6-character code that was shared with you.
room.invalid_code: Invalid code: it must be 6 characters.
room.not_found: Table not found: the code may be wrong or expired.

table.qr_instruction: Scan the QR code with your phone, or tap the link below.
table.invalid_qr_description: This QR code is not recognized or has expired. Ask the venue staff.
table.group_hint: Play as a team with friends at your table
table.join_error_generic: Unexpected error while joining. Check your connection and try again.
table.active_sessions_empty: No active groups. Create the first one!

invite.title: Invite to the table
invite.description: Latecomers can join in seconds: show the QR or share the link and code.
invite.qr_hint: Have whoever wants to join scan this QR.
invite.share_text: Join our game table “{venue}” on Sottobicchiere! 🎲

lobby.no_players: No players yet. You're the first!
lobby.alone_description: Most games need at least 2 players: invite someone to play together.
lobby.games_description: Multiplayer mini-games will be available soon.
lobby.games_filter_empty: No games match this number of players.
lobby.game_end_success_toast: Game ended: you can pick another game.
lobby.game_end_error_toast: Could not end the game. Please try again.
lobby.game_host_only: Only the host can select a game.
lobby.dating_toggle_hint: Send and receive anonymous messages from other tables
lobby.areas_description: Create game zones (e.g. Living room, Kitchen) and let everyone pick where they are.
lobby.areas_empty: No areas yet. The host can create one.
lobby.area_create_error_toast: Could not create the area. Please try again.
lobby.area_join_error_toast: Could not update your area. Please try again.
lobby.game_select_error_toast: Could not select game. Please try again in a moment.
lobby.leave_error_toast: Error while leaving lobby. Please try again.
lobby.dating_message_timeout_toast: No confirmation received: your message may not have been delivered. Try again.

thumbs.title: Thumbs Up
thumbs.description: Vote 👍 or 👎 on opinion questions and challenge your friends!
thumbs.waiting_description: Wait for everyone to connect, then start the game.
thumbs.need_players: You need at least {n} players to start.
thumbs.waiting_host: Waiting for the host to advance to the next round…
thumbs.rules:
Each round shows an opinion question: vote 👍 (yes) or 👎 (no).
Once everyone present has voted, the votes are revealed.
You earn 1 point whenever your vote is in the majority: you win by siding with the group, you stay at zero by going against it.
The player with the most points after the last round wins (there's a team leaderboard too, if you created teams).
The host advances the rounds, can replay at the end or end the game early from the lobby.

reflex.title: Reflexes
reflex.description: Tap the moment the screen turns green: how fast are you?
reflex.hint: Tap the screen as soon as it turns green.
reflex.rules:
Tap the screen at the exact moment it turns green.
Tapping before green is a foul: start over.
The time is in milliseconds: the lower, the better. Beat your record!
It's a solo game: everyone plays on their own phone while waiting for the group.

duello.title: Duel
duello.description: Split screen: two challengers, the fastest thumb wins.
duello.intro: Sit on opposite sides of the phone, one hand each on your half.
duello.rules:
Two players share one phone, one per half of the screen.
When both halves turn green, the first to tap their own half wins the round.
Tapping before green loses the round instantly.
The first to win 3 rounds wins the duel.

dares.title: Pre-Party
dares.description: A deck of dares, truths and challenges: pass the phone and heat things up.
dares.intro: Sit in a circle. Take turns drawing a card and doing what it says.
dares.sip_disclaimer: Drink responsibly: every "sip" can be swapped for a forfeit.
dares.rules:
Sit in a circle and pass the phone clockwise.
Each turn shows a card — Truth, Dare, Rule, Sip or Everyone — and whoever holds the phone does it.
Rules stay in effect until the game ends; whoever breaks one does a forfeit.
It's a light drinking game: every "sip" can always be swapped for a forfeit for non-drinkers. Drink responsibly.

categorie.title: Categories
categorie.description: Name something in the category before time runs out, then pass the phone.
categorie.intro: Play in a circle: a category appears and the timer starts.
categorie.time_up_hint: Whoever held the phone does a forfeit (or drinks).
categorie.hint: Say it out loud, then tap to pass the phone.
categorie.rules:
A category appears (e.g. "Beer brands") and a timer starts.
Whoever holds the phone says out loud something that fits the category, then taps "Done" and passes the phone to the next person: the timer restarts.
You can't repeat an answer already given.
Whoever is holding the phone when time runs out loses the round and does a forfeit. Then change category.

word_blitz.title: Word Blitz
word_blitz.description: Say a word fast: quick warm-up before full realtime matches.
word_blitz.prompt: Write a word starting with letter:
word_blitz.local_note: Local prototype mode: next step will make this realtime for the table.
word_blitz.rules:
A letter appears: quickly type a word starting with that letter and press Enter.
The word joins the history and a new letter shows up right away: the goal is speed — saying it out loud counts double.
Local prototype mode: words stay on your device and there are no points or winners yet — practice while waiting for the realtime version.

error.title: Oops! Something went wrong
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
